## IP Summary
Parameterizable glitch-free clock multiplexer (CMUX). Selects one of N
(2–16) clock sources under synchronous control, guarantees no glitch on
the output during dynamic switching, and optionally gates the output clock.

## Assumptions
1. IP is a clock multiplexer (CMUX) — name prefix 'cmux' interpreted accordingly
2. Glitch-free output is the primary functional requirement
3. No architect handoff or imported spec; bootstrapped from IP name
4. Default NUM_INPUTS=4, SEL_WIDTH=$clog2(NUM_INPUTS)
5. ENABLE_CLK_GATE defaults to 0 (no gating)
6. No FSM required — continuous combinational/clock-domain-crossing logic
7. No registers or interrupts (clock infrastructure block)
